item.title: Men jailed over plot to attack Jewish community
item.description: They were planning what police say could have been "the UK's deadliest terror attack".

item.title: Rubio warns Europe of new era in geopolitics before big Munich speech
item.description: The US Secretary of State will address the first major transatlantic meeting since Donald Trump threatened to annex Greenland.

item.title: Medal hope Bankes 'lost' after quarter-final exit
item.description: Charlotte Bankes hoped to "put on a better show" as her Olympic hoodoo continues with a quarter-final exit from the snowboard cross - in another misse...

item.title: Medal hope Bankes 'lost' after quarter-final exit
item.description: Charlotte Bankes hoped to "put on a better show" as her Olympic hoodoo continues with a quarter-final exit from the snowboard cross - in another misse...

item.title: Stars offer support after husband of influencer Lorna Luxe dies
item.description: Luxe announced his death to her 1.7 million Instagram followers, saying she was "heartbroken".
